name: unredacted
description: Searchable archive of declassified UAP documents from the Department of War PURSUE program

scripts.deploy:site: cd site && bun run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=unredacted-site
scripts.deploy: bun run deploy:worker && bun run deploy:site
scripts.seed: python3 scripts/seed.py | wrangler d1 execute unredacted-db --remote --file=-
